Name: Ellissya
Description: A female Genespawn, Ellissya believed herself to be the ruler of Elysium. Finding herself on the barren glacial plains, she made her way to "Brother" Bloodseed's headquarters. She came across one dead Genespawn who was entangled with a dead dino-creature (or mutant), and an Earth car. Going further, she found Lysander, and helped him escape. After encountering the Great One, Lysander removed his helmet and Ellissya's bloodrush kicked in, causing her to attack him.
